skills.name: sch-create
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: Create a new Skill from scratch. Guided scaffolding for StudyClawHub / ClawHub.

skills.name: sch-submit
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: Submit and register a Skill or Agent to StudyClawHub via GitHub Issues.

skills.name: sch-install
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: Install a Skill or Agent from StudyClawHub. Clones the repo and sets up locally.

skills.name: sch-search
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: LLM-driven semantic search across all registered Skills on StudyClawHub.

skills.name: sch-deps
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: Check, add, or fix dependencies for a Skill or Agent.

skills.name: poker-bot
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: Multi-agent poker system -- AI bots with distinct personalities play Texas Hold'em with real-time GTO coaching.

skills.name: coachbot
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: PokerBot entry SKILL -- real-time GTO poker coach. Trigger: "play poker", "开一局", "teach me poker", "review hands", "该不该call", "EV多少".

skills.name: poker-strategy
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: PokerBot internal dependency -- GTO poker calculation tools and strategy docs. Pure internal component, never triggered directly.

skills.name: pokernow-runtime
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: PokerBot fallback SKILL -- pokernow.com adapter. Only triggered when user provides a pokernow.com/games/ URL.

skills.name: poker-server
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: PokerBot infrastructure SKILL -- self-hosted poker engine + relay layer. Internal component, never user-triggered.

skills.name: bot-management
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: PokerBot internal SKILL -- AI poker bot lifecycle management. Trigger: "加几个bot", "add bots", "create bot", "bot stuck".

skills.name: latex-report
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: NeurIPS-style LaTeX report scaffolding and formatting.

skills.name: sch-delete
skills.author: EnyanDai
skills.description: Delete a Skill or Agent from StudyClawHub. Use when a student says 'sch delete', 'delete skill', 'remove from StudyClawHub', 'unregister skill'.

skills.name: arxiv-network-builder
skills.author: Shengyi-Chung
skills.description: Build social networks from arXiv papers. Trigger: '查找关于 [关键词] 的最新论文', '分析 [领域] 的学者关系', '搜索本周关于 [主题] 的新论文', '构建 [领域] 的合作网络图'
